title: balsamea mukul
intro: Balsamea mukul, also known as Guggul, is a plant-based resin extracted from the Commiphora mukul tree, native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Balsamea mukul include reducing cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and aiding in the management of various health conditions such as arthritis and diabetes. Balsamea mukul is commonly used in herbal preparations like capsules, tablets, and ghee (clarified butter), which can be used to treat various health issues.
